data.title: SenseTime Grants Over 311 Million RSUs to Boost Performance
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from SenseTime Group, Inc. Class B ( (HK:0020) ).

SenseTime Group Inc. announced the grant of 311,333,631 restricted share units (RSUs) under its 2022 RSU Scheme to eligible employees and service providers. This move, which represents approximately 0.84% of the company’s total issued shares, is aimed at incentivizing performance and aligning interests with stakeholders. The RSUs have a vesting period ranging from 13 to 50 months and are subject to performance targets and a clawback mechanism to ensure compliance and performance alignment.

More about SenseTime Group, Inc. Class B

SenseTime Group Inc. operates in the artificial intelligence industry, providing AI software and services. The company focuses on developing AI technologies for various applications, including smart cities, education, healthcare, and autonomous driving.

data.title: Pioneer Credit Pursues Legal Action Against PwC Over Accounting Advice
data.description:
Pioneer Credit Ltd ( (AU:PNC) ) has issued an update.

Pioneer Credit Limited is pursuing litigation against PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) for negligence and misleading conduct related to accounting advice given in 2017. The company claims losses exceeding $32 million due to PwC’s guidance on accounting standards, and the case is progressing with procedural orders set for further evidence. The outcome of this litigation could significantly impact Pioneer’s financial recovery and stakeholder confidence.

More about Pioneer Credit Ltd

Pioneer Credit is an ASX-listed company providing high-quality, flexible financial services to help Australians overcome financial difficulties. The company is trusted by long-term vendor partners to support customers in achieving financial independence, leveraging strong industry relationships, a solid compliance record, and a customer-focused culture.

YTD Price Performance: -21.43%

Average Trading Volume: 202,576

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$69.96M

data.title: Neuren Pharmaceuticals Updates on Ongoing Buy-Back Program
data.description:
An update from Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited ( (AU:NEU) ) is now available.

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back program. As of the latest update, the company has repurchased a total of 1,896,260 securities, with 36,611 securities bought back on the previous day. This buy-back initiative is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited operates in the pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of therapies for neurological disorders. The company is known for its work on treatments for conditions such as Rett syndrome and Fragile X syndrome, aiming to address unmet medical needs in these areas.

data.title: Ye Xing Group Holdings Reports Revenue Growth Amidst Increased Losses in 2024
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Ye Xing Group Holdings Limited ( (HK:1941) ).

Ye Xing Group Holdings Limited reported a total revenue of approximately RMB377.3 million for the year ended 31 December 2024, marking a 10.5% increase from the previous year. Despite the revenue growth, the company faced a comprehensive loss of approximately RMB21.6 million, attributed to increased impairment losses and administrative expenses, impacting its financial performance.

More about Ye Xing Group Holdings Limited

Ye Xing Group Holdings Limited operates in the property management industry, offering property management services, property developer related services, and value-added services. The company focuses on managing residential and commercial properties, with a significant portion of its revenue derived from property management services.

data.title: Royal Bank of Canada Issues $3 Billion in Senior Notes
data.description:
Royal Bank Of Canada ( (TSE:RY) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 27, 2025, Royal Bank of Canada announced the issuance of Senior Global Medium-Term Notes, Series J, amounting to $3 billion. This issuance includes both fixed and floating rate notes due in 2028 and 2031, reflecting the bank’s strategic move to strengthen its financial position and provide diverse investment options, potentially impacting its market presence and stakeholder interests.

More about Royal Bank Of Canada

Royal Bank of Canada is a major financial institution in the banking industry, offering a wide range of financial services including personal and commercial banking, wealth management, insurance, investor services, and capital markets products and services on a global scale.

data.title: Inventronics Reports Financial Decline in 2024 Results
data.description:
Inventronics ( (TSE:IVX) ) just unveiled an update.

Inventronics Limited reported a net loss of $62,000 for the fiscal year 2024, a significant decline from the net earnings of $369,000 in 2023. The company’s revenue also decreased from $8,859,000 in 2023 to $6,309,000 in 2024, reflecting challenges in its financial performance. The decline in financial results may impact Inventronics’ operations and market positioning, potentially influencing stakeholder confidence.

More about Inventronics

Inventronics Limited designs and manufactures enclosures and other products for the telecommunication, cable, electric distribution, energy, and other industries in North America. The company owns an ISO 9001-registered production facility in Brandon, Manitoba, and its shares trade on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol ‘IVX.’

data.title: KO Gold Inc. Launches C$2 Million Private Placement to Boost New Zealand Exploration
data.description:
KO Gold, Inc. ( (TSE:KOG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

KO Gold Inc. announced a non-brokered private placement to raise up to C$2 million by issuing 10 million units at C$0.20 each. The proceeds will fund general working capital and ongoing exploration and drilling programs in the Otago Gold District, New Zealand. The company’s drilling program aims to discover high-grade mineralized shear zones in the Carrick Goldfield and test extensions of the Hyde-Macraes Shear Zone near OceanaGold’s active Macraes Gold Mine. This initiative could enhance KO Gold’s operational capacity and strengthen its position in the gold exploration industry.

More about KO Gold, Inc.

KO Gold Inc. is a Canadian junior exploration company listed on the CSE under the symbol ‘KOG’. The company focuses on acquiring and exploring gold properties in the Otago Gold District in New Zealand. KO Gold holds eight 100%-owned prospecting and exploration permits covering a total area of 740 km². The company has invested over C$3 million in exploration and drilling activities in the region over the past five years.

YTD Price Performance: -38.33%

Average Trading Volume: 10,912

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: CMB.TECH Reports Strong 2024 Results Amid Strategic Transformation
data.description:
Euronav ( (CMBT) ) has shared an update.

CMB.TECH reported a significant annual profit of $870.8 million for 2024, marking a transformational year with a strategic shift towards sustainability and diversification. The company changed its name from Euronav, expanded its fleet with newbuild ships, and entered into a share purchase agreement with Hemen Holding Limited for shares in Golden Ocean Group. Additionally, CMB.TECH is collaborating with MOL on ammonia-powered ships, aligning with the industry’s decarbonization goals.

More about Euronav

CMB.TECH, formerly known as Euronav, operates in the maritime industry with a focus on fleet rejuvenation and diversification. The company is transitioning from a crude oil tanker shipping company to a diversified maritime group, emphasizing green technologies and sustainability. It has invested in hydrogen production facilities and R&D centers for hydrogen engines, and is actively expanding its fleet with newbuild ships.
